programme.desc: The owner of the Summit House Grill and Tap has pushed his marriage and business to the breaking point by drinking away his financial sorrows and hitting on female patrons.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Bellator 208: Fedor vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Long Island as MMA legend Fedor Emelianenko takes on the American Gangster Chael Sonnen with the winner advancing to the finals of the Heavyweight World Grand Prix. Also, Benson Henderson and Cheick Kongo return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Israel with a featherweight world title fight as Patricio Pitbull puts the belt on the line against Emmanuel Sanchez. Also Light Heavyweights Phil Davis takes on Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Thackerville as John Salter and Chidi Njokuani face off in a pivotal middleweight showdown.

programme.title: Best of Patchy Mix
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Patchy Mix!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator crosses the Atlantic to bring viewers an action-packed card from Genoa, Italy! The main event sees hometown hero and Italian superstar Alessio Sakara take on Kent Kauppinen in a matchup of light heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Hawaii with the long awaited rematch between Brent Primus and (Iron) Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title. Also on the card is a showdown between heavyweight legend Frank Mir and knockout artist Javy (Eye Candy) Ayala.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Horrific allegations are tearing a family apart. Todd, ex girlfriend Latia & mom Diana tell their versions of sexual misconduct. Todd says he will do anything to prove his innocence. Dr. Phil calls in a polygraph examiner, with shocking results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Connie wrote Dr. Phil for help, concerned for her grandchildren. Jennifer's daughter drank bleach from her sippy cup when she was 3 and was found with a backpack of maggots, mold and rotten milk at 7. Dr. Phil delves into Jennifer's history as a parent.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you ever wonder how your favorite Dr. Phil guest is faring since being on the show? Dr. Phil follows up with some of his most talked about guests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The disappearance of Connecticut mom of 5, Jennifer Dulos has captivated the media. Dr. Phil's team of experts analyze circumstances surrounding her disappearance, including Jennifer Dulos' estranged husband, Fotis, & his girlfriend, Michelle Troconis.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil goes into his mailbag to answer viewers' popular questions! He has help from commedienne and author Teresa Strasser. When Teresa talks to moms on the street, find out their biggest parenting and pregnancy queries. Update on Ted Williams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Misti says her mother, Lisa, is a "raging alcoholic" failing rehab 3 times and was arrested and charged with her third DUI just days before. Lisa says she's not an alcoholic, just a person who likes to drink. Can Dr. Phil give Lisa a reality check?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil welcomes controversial YouTuber "Agent Sebastian" who runs a page called "Cart Narcs" posting hundreds of explosive videos apprehending shoppers in parking lots who do not return their carts to the corrals. Is "Agent Sebastian" breaking the law?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Author Dr. Philip Zimbardo, The Lucifer Effect: Understanding How Good People Turn Evil, and Dr. Phil examined what makes a good person do bad things. They continue to explore blind obedience to authority & an eye-opening experiment on group conformity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alisha says her son, Kevin, 10, pushed the family to the limit with violent outbursts. At home, knives and lighters are hidden & siblings lock themselves in their rooms at night. Alisha's says the 'future Kevin' may hurt the entire family or end a life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced parents Christina and Jim along with daughter Tara, 21, discuss that dad's new wife is the same age as Tara, how it's ok Tara is a webcam model to help pay bills, and that all this is making Tara a raging, angry monster with low self-esteem.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Police called it one of worst crimes ever. A boy held captive under the stairs. Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was starved and abused. His stepmother, Tammi Bleimeyer, now behind bars, denied hurting Jordan but her children reveal how they saved Jordan's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha launched a YouTube channel, "Truthfully Trisha". She says she deals with her family's disapproval and also her online "haters". Husband, Sean, says he's fed up with his wife's streaming. Can Dr. Phil help Trisha disconnect to focus on family? Pt. 1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive in the mountain town of Silver Dollar City, where Granny starts a feud with an old rival, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Bird watcher Jane Hathaway hikes into the woods and finds a man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts rehearse for Elly May's wedding to backwoodsman Matthew Templeton, unaware that banker Drysdale wants it stopped.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale and Jane arrive in New York to persuade the hillbillies to abandon their half-built cabin in Central Park and return home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellems, proprietor of the hotel in Silver Dollar, sells out and leaves the hills to join the Clampetts in California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny uses her shotgun as she punishes Jethro for leading too wild a Hollywood life with Shorty Kellems.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed prepares to underwrite con man Honest John's scheme to drill a channel in the mountains to draw off the smog in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie is haunted by nightmares about her father's suicide. David learns that his mother requires shock therapy to improve her chances of recovery. Toni throws a dinner party while her father is out of town.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie gets herself invited on a road trip with Kelly, Donna and Clare. Steve convinces Brandon to let a director film a movie at the Walsh house. Marchette tells Toni that Dylan is using her.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie accepts her marketing professor's invitation to a seminar. Bruno delivers a letter from Dylan to Toni. Steve and Clare quarrel after booking a motel room. Donna resists Ray's relentless attempts at a reconciliation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: A fortune teller sets up shop at the Peach Pit for Halloween. In spite of her questionable credibility, her presence has an impact on many couples.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan asks Toni to marry him. An earthquake rocks the major Los Angeles area, spooking Colin. Donna sees her mother in a photograph of the 1969 Rose Court contestants, but Felice refuses to explain herself.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: The guys kidnap Dylan for his bachelor party. The girls throw a much wilder time for bride-to-be Toni.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna makes the Rose Court, and her mother reveals her reasons for not supporting her in the pageant.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Colin and Susan leave for New York to spend Thanksgiving with their families. The gang decides to spend the holiday together, and David invites his mother to join them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joe rejects a plea bargain and decides to go to trial. The Associated Press picks up Brandon's story about the trial for nationwide syndication. Colin babysits for Erin while Kelly and David are at the trial.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna fills in for Lisa at a convenience store. A young boy is caught stealing a teddy bear for his brother's birthday, but Donna covers for him. Brandon alienates Nat and Susan as he gets carried away during the After Dark's charity casino night.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Cindy surprises Brandon by coming to visit for Christmas. Joe tries to keep an antsy Donna in suspense about her Christmas/birthday present.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly's father swoops into town, and once again sweeps her off of her feet with promises of a relationship. Nat is reunited with an old-flame.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly takes refuge back with Colin, and ends up on a bender.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Susan is nominated for a college journalism award for her story about a girl's decision to have an abortion. Valerie arranges a meeting between Colin and a knowledgeable art buyer in the hopes of encouraging Colin to get clean and focus on his career.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: A crucial piece of evidence comes to light in Kat's investigation of Leslie, Ted struggles with how to repair his relationship with Nicole, and Anita fears the past will derail her future.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Ted and Eva discuss Leslie's manipulations and Sharon confronts Anita with the painful truth of their past.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie turns to an unlikely source for help; Naomi and Hayley find themselves in a life-changing situation; and Dani struggles with her insecurities about Andre.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Jacob catches a break in Leslie's case; Doug has unexpected news for Bill; and Chelsea makes a mysterious connection

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat receives unexpected news; Laura turns to an unlikely source for help, and Sharon's bitterness threatens to derail the reunion with Anita. Meanwhile, Ted coaxes a confession out of Eva.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Unaware of hidden dangers, Eva and Tomas share an intimate moment; Vanessa confronts Doug about his gambling debts, and Chelsea opens up to Naomi about her feelings for someone special.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole questions Eva's motives and Kat takes matters into her own hands. The women in Bill's life rally around him.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Chelsea and Madison connect, Vernon calms a nervous Naomi, and Dani's feelings for her ex complicate things with her new boo.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita updates Vernon on the Articulettes. Elsewhere, Madison supports Chelsea through Bill's recovery.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat sets a trap for Leslie. Smitty's new assignment could spell trouble for Martin. Ted has a surprising offer for Eva.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin's past haunts his present, Ashley fears Derek's intentions, and Chelsea's new romance challenges her emotionally.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vanessa plays a high-stakes game with Joey. Ashley and Derek's relationship status changes. Martin's past comes rushing back. Naomi confides in Andre.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vanessa comes to terms with what she's willing, or...not willing, to sacrifice for Doug. Smitty urges Martin to seek treatment for his hallucinations. Dani and Andre make a stunning confession.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Andre gives Ted relationship advice. Chelsea and Madison take a big step in their relationship. Bill's recovery leaves Hayley with more questions than answers.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat has high expectations for Tomas. Naomi vows to help June recover her most cherished possession. Smitty's investigation threatens to expose secrets.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vernon takes matters into his own hands. Vanessa leans into her new partnership with Joey. Nicole has life-changing news for Ted.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: BEYOND THE GATES follows the Duprees, a powerful and prestigious multi-generational family that is the very definition of Black royalty. But behind the pristine walls and lush, manicured gardens are juicy secrets and scandals waiting to be uncovered.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat has a romantic surprise for Tomas, Jacob worries Smitty's investigation will hurt his father's reputation, and Bill and Dani share a heart to heart.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: A guest makes controversial comments at the retreat in Malibu, sparking a heated argument; Reza names MJ as his maid of honor; Reza's fiancé's parents visit for the first time, laying bare an old family wound.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike separates himself from the group; MJ enlists the help of Reza to prepare her boyfriend for a surprise brunch with her mother; Asifa and Bobby finally move in together; Mike pops the question to his longtime girlfriend, Jessica.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reality sets in for Reza as he faces the truth about marrying Adam; GG enlists MJ's help to get back into the dating scene; Asa nears a breaking point; everyone agrees to a game of dodgeball to relieve tension.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Despite growing reservations about his relationship with Adam, Reza goes on a diet in anticipation of his upcoming nuptials; Mike dives into wedding planning while trying to reconnect with Reza; GG takes a polygraph test; MJ suffers a loss.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: With wedding plans still unsettled, Reza decides to have a destination wedding in Thailand; Asifa gives herself a Bollywood themed birthday party; Reza rescinds Mike's wedding invitation, creating chaos at Pablo's memorial service.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el teniente Mann se unen para una investigación conjunta que se complica para Gibbs cuando un testigo del caso resulta ser su exmujer.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky determina que uno de sus cuerpos de investigación ha sido víctima de un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS descubre una red de intrigas criminales.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan un intento de asesinato contra un famoso médico de fertilidad. Eddie es llamado para intervenir en un asunto familiar de los Reagan que involucra a los hijos de Danny.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Eddie y su nueva pareja, Maya, se enfrentan con Jamie en el trabajo cuando no intervienen en una disputa pública en una tienda de conveniencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales para Danny cuando Luis Delgado, el sicario del cartel de la droga responsable de incendiar su casa, reaparece.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando JJ y Jefe de Sección de Cruz son secuestrados, el UAC se adentra en la época de JJ en el Departamento de Estado para encontrar pistas sobre su desaparición y descubrir una misión secreta que ahora pone sus vidas en peligro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La confrontación final entre el equipo de NCIS y un escurridizo traficante de armas llega a una conclusión explosiva y mortal en el estreno de la temporada cinco de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En la autopsia, Ducky realiza un sorprendente descubrimiento que conduce a la búsqueda de un niño perdido. Mientras tanto, Tony se esfuerza para hacer frente a sus sentimientos por Jeanne.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el teniente Mann se unen para una investigación conjunta que se complica para Gibbs cuando un testigo del caso resulta ser su exmujer.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky determina que uno de sus cuerpos de investigación ha sido víctima de un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS descubre una red de intrigas criminales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom es el supervisor del turno de noche de los investigadores de élite de la escena del crimen de Las Vegas. Holly Gribbs, recién salida de la academia, se une al equipo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre es asesinado después de haber ganado una fortuna y haber dejado a su novia. Entonces, Grissom, Nick y la recién llegada al equipo de CSI, Sara Sidle, investigan este caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El espíritu de una víctima no dejará a Calleigh en paz hasta que ella haga justicia por su asesinato. Debe contar con la ayuda de Horatio y el resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 15 de Octubre de 1985, dos explosiones de bombas sacudieron a Salt Lake City y resultaron en dos muertes. Una tercera explosión ocurrió al día siguiente; esta vez, la víctima sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav Belize In Love (Finale)
programme.desc: Two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Placencia Belize for an exotic three day getaway during their stay.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Reunion)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the Flavorettes from season 2 are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Casting Special
programme.desc: From twins to super freaks, peep the girls vying for Flav's heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated with her heavy workload, Alli decides to have a little fun -- with or without Dave.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After several days without sleep, Alli crashes at the worst possible time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: At the Battle of the Bands, Adam really hits it off with Missy, another musician.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: During Spirit Week at Degrassi, everyone has something to prove. Cam feels threatened by Zig, Dallas makes a flirty bet with Alli, and Eli's relationship with Clare is tested.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes at Degrassi, everyone deals with the situation in a different way. As the students struggle to cope, Simpson cancels Spirit Week.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worried about Eli's mental state, Clare becomes overprotective. Katie wants Jake back, but is it too late? Jenna must choose between two guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Drew moves out, there's a break-in at the loft, and Fiona fears for her safety. Someone from Dallas' past pays him a surprise visit. A tough assignment forces Zig to think about the mistakes he's made.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Tracing the history of cave paintings.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Sacred Pool in the Lion Temple has produced the biggest orb of Golden Chi ever.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe, and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water, and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuestros Shores siguen conociendo Madrid. Tras unos momentos picantes durante una típica siesta española, dan un paseo por el centro de la capital.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras Esteban está en la habitación del amor dos de sus invitadas provocan un conflicto en la casa. Lo que en principio era una fiesta de risas y cachondeo se convierte en una guerra donde el joven acabará perdiendo los estribos

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Cuando todo era paz y armonía la llegada de la Boss, hará poner las pilas a los chicos antes de que vayan a pasar un día de campo. Con los chicos cansados de pasar un día en el campo llega una nueva fuente de energía, Potro vuelve al grupo

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después del encontronazo viene la pelea y así es como comienza el capítulo. Todos los chicos intentan mediar en la pelea, pero entre ellas ya no se toleran y no dudarán en utilizar todas sus armas para conseguir dañar a su oponente

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¿Seguirán juntos, Igor y Arantxa?, ¿Qué ocurrirá entre Jawy y Elettra?, y cómo será la última noche de los chicos en Madrid? Fiesta, amor, celos y lágrimas estarán presentes en el último capítulo de Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos ven por primera vez su verano y reaccionan aquellos momentos vividos tanto en Mykonos, Madrid y Barcelona

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
